/* Fraction.js v5.0.0 10/1/2024 https://raw.org/article/rational-numbers-in-javascript/ Copyright (c) 2024, Robert Eisele (https://raw.org/) Licensed under the MIT license. */ const Fraction = require('fraction.js'); function toFraction(frac) { var map = { '1:4': "¼", '1:2': "½", '3:4': "¾", '1:7': "⅐", '1:9': "⅑", '1:10': "⅒", '1:3': "⅓", '2:3': "⅔", '1:5': "⅕", '2:5': "⅖", '3:5': "⅗", '4:5': "⅘", '1:6': "⅙", '5:6': "⅚", '1:8': "⅛", '3:8': "⅜", '5:8': "⅝", '7:8': "⅞" }; return map[frac.n + ":" + frac.d] || frac.toFraction(false); } console.log(toFraction(Fraction(0.25))); // ¼
